query: amateur snapshot with crooked tilted horizon, accidentally rotated photo, off-kilter handheld shot
message: composition_and_structure / unconventional_framing — anti_aesthetic. Off-kilter, dutch-angle, accidentally rotated handheld snapshots with informal vernacular framing. Includes parties, sports wipeouts, fallen signs, casual portraiture, awkward angles.

response.objective_caption: Several large fragments of a pale gray gravestone rest on the ground among brown fallen leaves in a wooded cemetery, with patches of green moss visible on the stone surfaces. A small star-shaped metal marker stands to the right of the stone pieces. Additional upright gravestones, scattered rocks, and tree roots appear in the background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Severely fractured and moss-covered gravestone fragments lie scattered on the ground amid dead brown leaves, capturing the decay and degradation of an old cemetery plot. A small ornamental star-shaped metal marker stands beside the broken stone pieces, while additional weathered upright headstones and exposed tree roots fill the background, conveying entropy and the passage of time.
